---
title: "TeX math sampler for `format: typst`"
---

<!--
A cross-section of TeX math constructs (drawn from the LaTeX Wikibook's
Mathematics chapter) rendered under `format: typst` to see which survive
the Pandoc texmath → Typst writer pipeline.

Rendering this file produces sampler.pdf and sampler.typ (via keep-typ).
Inspect sampler.typ to see how each construct is translated.

Constructs known to fail are listed in the "Known broken" section at the
end, commented out with notes so the rest still renders cleanly.
-->

## 1. Basics: sub/superscripts, fractions, roots

Inline: $x^2$, $x_i$, $x_i^2$, $\frac{a}{b}$, $\sqrt{x}$, $\sqrt[3]{x}$, $\tfrac{1}{2}$, $\dfrac{1}{2}$.

## 2. Decorated symbols

$\bar{x}$, $\hat{x}$, $\tilde{x}$, $\vec{x}$, $\dot{x}$, $\ddot{x}$, $\overline{xyz}$, $\widehat{xyz}$, $\widetilde{xyz}$, $\overrightarrow{AB}$, $\overbrace{x+y+z}^{n}$, $\underbrace{a+b+c}_{m}$.

## 3. Greek letters

$\alpha, \beta, \gamma, \delta, \epsilon, \varepsilon, \zeta, \eta, \theta, \vartheta, \iota, \kappa, \lambda, \mu, \nu, \xi, \pi, \varpi, \rho, \varrho, \sigma, \varsigma, \tau, \upsilon, \phi, \varphi, \chi, \psi, \omega$

Capitals: $\Gamma, \Delta, \Theta, \Lambda, \Xi, \Pi, \Sigma, \Upsilon, \Phi, \Psi, \Omega$

## 4. Operators

$\sum_{i=1}^{n} x_i$, $\prod_{i=1}^{n} x_i$, $\int_0^1 f(x)\,dx$, $\iint_D$, $\iiint_V$, $\oint$, $\lim_{x \to \infty}$, $\limsup$, $\liminf$, $\min_{x}$, $\max_{x}$.

## 5. Relations

$a = b$, $a \neq b$, $a \leq b$, $a \geq b$, $a \equiv b$, $a \approx b$, $a \sim b$, $a \simeq b$, $a \cong b$, $a \propto b$, $a \ll b$, $a \gg b$, $a \subset b$, $a \supseteq b$, $a \in b$, $a \notin b$.

## 6. aligned (amsmath)

$$
\begin{aligned}
f(x) &= (x + 1)^2 \\
     &= x^2 + 2x + 1
\end{aligned}
$$

## 7. gather

$$
\begin{gathered}
a = b + c \\
d = e - f
\end{gathered}
$$

## 8. cases

$$
f(x) = \begin{cases} x & \text{if } x \geq 0 \\ -x & \text{if } x < 0 \end{cases}
$$

## 9. Matrices

`pmatrix` and `bmatrix` work. `vmatrix` and `Vmatrix` are broken — see the "Known broken" section below.

$$
M = \begin{pmatrix} a & b \\ c & d \end{pmatrix}, \quad
N = \begin{bmatrix} 1 & 0 \\ 0 & 1 \end{bmatrix}
$$

## 10. Delimiters

$\left( \frac{a}{b} \right)$, $\left[ x \right]$, $\left\{ y \right\}$, $\left| z \right|$, $\left\lfloor x \right\rfloor$, $\left\lceil x \right\rceil$, $\left\langle \phi \right\rangle$.

## 11. Text and font styles

$\text{for all } x \in X$, $\mathrm{rm}$, $\mathbf{bf}$, $\mathit{it}$, $\mathsf{sf}$, $\mathtt{tt}$, $\mathcal{CAL}$, $\mathbb{RN}$, $\mathfrak{FR}$.

## 12. Spacing

$a\,b$ (thin), $a\:b$ (medium), $a\;b$ (thick), $a\!b$ (neg), $a\quad b$, $a\qquad b$.

## 13. Arrows

$\to, \gets, \rightarrow, \leftarrow, \Rightarrow, \Leftarrow, \Leftrightarrow, \mapsto, \xrightarrow{f}, \xleftarrow{g}, \overset{!}{=}, \underset{n \to \infty}{\lim}$.

## 14. Substack and stacked limits

$$
\sum_{\substack{i = 1 \\ i \neq j}}^{n} a_i
$$

## 15. mathtools (partial)

`\coloneqq` and `\eqqcolon` work; most other mathtools commands don't (see "Known broken" below).

$a \coloneqq b$, $a \eqqcolon b$.

## Known broken

The following constructs either crash the Typst compile, cause Pandoc to
warn and pass raw TeX through, or silently drop content. Each is commented
out to keep the rest of this file renderable.

`vmatrix` and `Vmatrix` (fatal Typst error)
: Pandoc's Typst writer emits `mat(delim: "||")` but Typst requires a
  single-character delim. Workaround: raw Typst, or `pmatrix` with
  explicit `\lvert`/`\lVert` delimiters.

`\mathclap` (passes through as literal TeX)
: Not recognised by texmath; the source appears verbatim in the PDF.

`\begin{dcases}` (Pandoc parse error)
: Not recognised by texmath. Use plain `cases`.

`\tag{label}` (silently dropped)
: The tag never appears in the output.

`\color{red}{...}` (silently dropped)
: `\color` is ignored; content renders in the default color.

` ```tikz ` blocks (not converted)
: The raw `\begin{tikzpicture}...\end{tikzpicture}` source appears as a
  code block in the PDF, not a diagram.

<!--
Keep the broken examples here for reference. Uncomment one at a time to
reproduce the failure mode.

$$
W = \begin{Vmatrix} p & q \\ r & s \end{Vmatrix}
$$

$\mathclap{\sum_{i=1}^{n}}$

$$
f(x) = \begin{dcases} x & x \geq 0 \\ -x & x < 0 \end{dcases}
$$

$$
E = mc^2 \tag{Einstein}
$$

$\color{red}{x+y}$

```tikz
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \draw (0,0) -- (1,1);
\end{tikzpicture}
```
-->
